steps.title: Identify the goal: show temporal order
steps.content: The prompt asks to “emphasize the order in which the supercontinents were formed”—meaning to clearly show which supercontinent formed first and which came later.

steps.title: Match sequence to the choices
steps.content: Choice B uses “formed long after,” directly showing that Euramerica came much later than Vaalbara—the exact temporal relationship the prompt asks for. A lists both supercontinents but no temporal link; C describes the general supercontinent cycle rather than the specific order; D includes only one supercontinent. That matches choice B — B is correct.
